Notice Of Motion And Motion For (1) Plaintiff'S Discharge Order (2) Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs To Plaintiff, And (3) Order Directing Deposit Of Funds With Court
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Tiffany L. Goodman, Esq., Rehon & Roberts (408) 494-0900 for Plaintiff and Moving Party Golden Gate Bank
George P. Eshoo, Esq. (650) 364-7030 for Defendant and Opposing Party Biagi
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BANK'S Motion For (1) Plaintiff'S Discharge Order (2) Award Of Attorney's Fees And Costs To Plaintiff; And (3) Order Directing Deposit Of Funds With Court is DENIED; pursuant to CCP 386(b), an interpleader is not proper. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213
